site.name: Bulgari
site.mechanism_justification: Bulgari.com is a luxury LVMH brand site that requires UC Chrome (undetected Chrome) for access. Standard HTTP and Playwright connections are blocked. The site uses a custom enterprise ecommerce platform with JavaScript-rendered product pages. UC Chrome successfully accessed the page with no proxy needed.

anti_bot.details: No CAPTCHA detected per probe, but standard Playwright and direct HTTP are blocked. The site has bot detection that requires an undetected browser (UC Chrome) to bypass. No Cloudflare or Akamai specifically identified, but fingerprinting or TLS-level detection is present.

connectivity.notes: UC Chrome without proxy successfully accessed the page. Standard Playwright MCP and direct HTTP are both blocked. JS rendering is required for the page to load product data.

product_discovery.url_pattern_notes: Bulgari product URLs follow the pattern /en-us/{category}/{product-slug}. Product slugs appear to be descriptive with optional product codes. The locale prefix (en-us) may vary by region.

selectors.title: Product name from page title or product detail section
selectors.price: Price element in product detail section
selectors.jsonld: Look for JSON-LD Product structured data in script tags

product_data_extraction.notes: Since the site uses JS rendering, product data will be available in the DOM after page load. Check for JSON-LD structured data first (schema.org Product), then fall back to CSS selectors for title, price, description, and images.

rate_limiting.justification: Luxury brand site with bot detection. Conservative delays recommended to avoid triggering additional protection. UC Chrome adds overhead per page load.
